shape_summary: Array of one Trend object per team summarizing the last-7-days performance.

last7W.description: Wins in the last 7 days, integer ≥ 0.

last7L.description: Losses in the last 7 days, integer ≥ 0.

runDiff7.description: Sum of (runsScored - runsAllowed) across the last-7-days games. Can be negative.

streak.description: Current streak as e.g. 'W3' or 'L2'. null when team had no games in the window.

sparklinePoints.description: Per-game cumulative run differential within the window, used for inline-SVG sparkline rendering. Empty array if no games.

invariants: Array length equals the number of teams in the input map (30 in production).
For any team with zero games in the window: last7W===0, last7L===0, runDiff7===0, streak===null, sparklinePoints===[].
last7W + last7L === total games played by that team in the window.
sparklinePoints.length === total games played by that team in the window when non-empty.
error_behavior: Pure function; throws TypeError only on malformed input shape.
